title: FirmSem: An Empirical Study of Security-Guard Survival in Release Binaries
description: Compact frozen-evidence and audit artifact for an empirical study of selected security-guard survival in release binaries. It includes GuardIR, independently adjudicated non-IID strata, deterministic and learned controls, frozen semantic-model transcripts, bounded mechanism-attribution evidence, and executable GCC/Clang policy replays. Multi-gigabyte compiler acquisition and build intermediates are deliberately excluded and documented.
notes: Project code is Apache-2.0; project-authored metadata, annotations, documentation, and figures are CC BY 4.0; third-party excerpts retain upstream terms.
